universal.rule: Start with existing repo patterns before inventing a new approach. Search 2-3 comparable examples when possible.
If the task touches more than one surface, check at least one adjacent surface or explicitly explain why you did not.
When commands inform your conclusion, include the exact command and the key output in EVIDENCE_REPORT.
If another surface appears to own the fix, state that in CROSS_LAYER_IMPACTS or OPEN_GAPS instead of guessing across domains.
When a command produces output that is evidence for your conclusion, include the literal output in VERBATIM_OUTPUTS. KEY_OUTPUTS is the summary; VERBATIM_OUTPUTS is the raw data.
